projects.title: TechFlow: AI Ecosystem Branding
projects.description: A comprehensive visual identity for a next-gen AI cloud provider.
projects.challenge: Creating a symbol that represents both technical rigidity and organic intelligence.
projects.solution: A generative gradient logo system that shifts based on the platform state.

projects.title: Floral Majesty: Royal Invitation
projects.description: High-end wedding collateral for a destination royal wedding.
projects.challenge: Balancing traditional Vedic symbols with a minimalist modern aesthetic.
projects.solution: Gold-foiled hand-drawn illustrations paired with clean serif typography.

projects.title: Neon Ghost: Streetwear Collection
projects.description: Concept designs for an underground streetwear label.
projects.challenge: Designing patterns that translate well across various fabric textures.
projects.solution: High-contrast vector patterns optimized for screen printing and embroidery.

projects.title: Divine AR: Spiritual Presence
projects.description: An immersive AR experience bringing divine art into the home.
projects.challenge: Achieving low-latency 3D rendering on mobile browsers.
projects.solution: Optimized GLB models with baked lighting for instant web-AR loading.
